items.title: Bank Stocks Hold Gains. Fed Sees Improved Growth, but More Rate Cuts.
items.description: Bank stocks are moving higher in the wake of the Federal Reserve rate decision, which included forecasts for firmer growth with largely steady inflation.  Goldman Sachs, the top-performing Dow stock of the year, was 0.8% higher at $790.44.  Fed officials lifted their 2025 GDP forecast to 1.6% from 1.4%, and nudged their 2026 estimate to 1.8% from 1.6%.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains a Hold Rating on Goldman Sachs Group (GS)
items.description: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) is one of the Best Performing Financial Stocks So Far in 2025. On September 4, Betsy Graseck of Morgan Stanley maintained a Hold rating on The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) with a price target of $706.
